visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) Tim stands in an outdoor park with green foliage. He is wearing a grey flat cap, glasses, a green windbreaker, and a pink shirt. He speaks directly to the camera while a blue car passes in the distance. (2) Cut to a brightly lit phone store where Tim gestures at mobile devices behind glass. (3) Close-up shots show a person's hands holding an iPhone. The screen displays the 'Tesla Robotaxi' app with a map of the Bay Area. (4) A blue Tesla Model Y arrives at a curb and flashes its hazard lights. Tim and a friend approach the car. (5) Inside the car, Tim is seated in the back row. He pulls the black seatbelt across his chest and clicks it into place. A large center console screen is visible showing vehicle status. (6) The car drives autonomously. The camera zooms in on the interior screen, which shows the car's navigation route and then switches to playing a YouTube video. (7) The steering wheel is shown moving automatically without human contact. Tim reacts with visible excitement. (8) The video concludes with the blue Tesla driving away on a suburban road, showing its rear 'TCP' license plate.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: 3c有意思tim哥. [Logo]: @3ctim. [Logo]: miko 米可手機館. [Subtitle]: Hello 我是Tim哥. (2) [Variety]: 特斯拉 Robotaxi. (3) [Slogan]: 推薦大家 買手機到米可. (4) [Variety]: Tesla Robotaxi. [Variety]: (來試乘看看!). (5) [Variety]: 各位準備上車!. (6) [Variety]: 閃爍車燈 告知乘客可以上車. (7) [Variety]: 點擊螢幕的「Start Ride」. (8) [Variety]: 前方螢幕顯示路線與路況. (9) [Variety]: 多媒體娛樂螢幕. (10) [Variety]: 行程中可自訂 冷氣、座椅、音樂等細節. (11) [Variety]: 自動輔助導航駕駛. (12) [Variety]: WOW!. (13) [Variety]: 自動停車功能 Autopark. (14) [Variety]: 太厲害了!. (15) [Variety]: 超讚的體驗!.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main creator (Tim) and 1 passenger/officer in the front seat of the vehicle.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Middle-aged man wearing a grey flat cap, glasses, a light green windbreaker over a bright pink t-shirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The video moves between a lush green outdoor park, a clean modern mobile phone retail store, and the interior of a high-tech Tesla vehicle driving through Silicon Valley suburban streets.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with Tim's high-energy narration over an upbeat electronic BGM with a strong rhythmic pulse. His voice is clear and projected. (2) A sharp 'pop' sound effect accompanies the visual transition to the store. The music maintains a constant 125 BPM tempo. (3) A metallic 'click' sound occurs when the phone is held up, followed by digital UI 'pings' as the app is opened. Tim's voice becomes more conversational. (4) The sound of a car door opening and closing is followed by the mechanical click of a seatbelt buckle. The BGM continues without interruption. (5) A series of digital 'dings' signal the car's autonomous system startup. A low-frequency hum from the electric motor is audible as the car accelerates. (6) Tim laughs and expresses surprise with a sharp 'Wow!', showing high vocal arousal. A digital UI chime plays as the car screen switches modes. (7) During the parking phase, the sound of the car's electric steering servos can be heard faintly. A final 'ding' confirms the end of the parking maneuver. (8) The BGM swells as Tim gives a closing remark, followed by a quick hard cut to silence.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Intro -> Application Setup -> Experience Showcase -> Conclusion
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To showcase the innovative experience of using the Tesla Robotaxi service while cross-promoting the Miko mobile retail brand.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator wears brand logos, explicitly mentions a specific mobile store (miko), and provides a call to action to buy phones there.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video efficiently combines tech lifestyle content with commercial sponsorship through rapid editing and high-energy narration.
